torch_pattern:
split_size = input_tensor_a.size(-1) // 2
split_tensors = torch.split(input_tensor_a, split_size_or_sections=[split_size, split_size], dim=dim)
tensA, tensB = split_tensors[0], split_tensors[1]
output = tensA * torch.nn.functional.gelu(tensB)

constraints.input_last_dim: must be even (split into two equal halves of size {LAST_DIM}//2)

applicability_notes: GEGLU fuses split-in-half along last dim, GELU on second half, and elementwise multiply with first half into a single op. Output last dim is half the input last dim. Common in transformer FFN blocks (e.g., diffusion model feed-forward layers) where a single Linear projects to 2*hidden and GEGLU gates it.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.geglu(input_tensor, dim)
